headline: EV Write-Offs Rise, Yet One Auto Giant Is Doubling Down
summary: Toyota rivals hit as it avoids EV write-downs. It is now expanding its U.S. EV lineup as Ford, GM, Stellantis and Honda retreat.

raw.headline: EV Write-Offs Rise, Yet One Auto Giant Is Doubling Down

headline: How is General Motors Using Strong Cash Flow to Fuel Growth?
summary: GM's FCF surges from $3B to $10B on average in five years, funding dividends, buybacks and $10B-$12B yearly investments to expand U.S. manufacturing capacity.

raw.headline: How is General Motors Using Strong Cash Flow to Fuel Growth?
raw.summary: GM's FCF surges from $3B to $10B on average in five years, funding dividends, buybacks and $10B-$12B yearly investments to expand U.S. manufacturing capacity.

headline: Ford (F) Fumbles Once Again and Continues To Disappoint Investors
summary: Summary: Ford (F) recently announced another recall; this time recalling over 83,000 vehicles. That combined with its on again/off again relationship with EV, has some beginning to question how long the company can continue fumbling the ball before its stock takes a hit and they begin to look elsewhere for new leadership. Two of our ... Ford (F) Fumbles Once Again and Continues To Disappoint Investors

headline: BofA Bullish on General Motors (GM), Describes It As Leading Automaker
summary: General Motors Company (NYSE:GM) earns a spot on our list of the 11 best value stocks to invest in according to billionaires. The broader analyst sentiment reflects optimism around GM’s outlook. As of March 9, 2026, the consensus price target of $100.00 implies a 33.89% upside potential, with almost 62% of analysts maintaining “Buy” ratings. […]

headline: Why in the World Is Carvana Betting on Stellantis?
summary: If you had to pick an automaker with a significant U.S. presence to bet on, why in the world would you choose Stellantis? This could be why.
